class.name: MultiNodeLabel
class.brief_description: Billboard text labels rendered above instances using a shared text atlas.
class.description: MultiNodeLabel renders text labels for instances using GPU-instanced billboard quads. All labels share a single text atlas texture built via SubViewport, drawn in one MultiMesh draw call. Per-instance text is set via set_instance_text(). Empty string = no label. The atlas rebuilds automatically when texts change. Labels always face the camera (Y-locked billboard).

members.member: The font used to render label text. If not set, the engine's default fallback font is used.
The font size in pixels used when rendering text into the atlas. Larger sizes produce sharper text but use more atlas space.
The color of the label text. Applied when rendering into the atlas, so changes trigger an atlas rebuild.
The color of the text outline. Helps text stand out against varying backgrounds.
The thickness of the text outline in pixels. Set to 0 to disable outlines.
The height of each label quad in world units. Width is automatically set to 3x the height. Controls how large labels appear in the 3D world.

method.name: set_instance_text
method.description: Set the text displayed for a specific instance. Empty string hides the label for that instance. Duplicate texts share atlas cells automatically. The atlas rebuilds on the next frame after all texts are set.

method.name: get_instance_text
method.description: Get the currently displayed text for a specific instance.
